# AI Builder Day

> Utah's biggest AI event. Two days of learning, building, and launching. Friday, May 8 is for learning (speakers, workshops, AI-for-beginners sessions). Saturday, May 9 is the AI Builder Day Hackathon with $35K+ in bounties and prizes. Produced by JustBuild in partnership with the Utah Governor's Office of Economic Opportunity.

## Event Details

- **Dates:** May 8–9, 2026
- **Location:** Lehi, UT (JobNimbus HQ)
- **Cost:** Free
- **Audience:** Engineers, designers, students, business owners, first-timers, anyone curious about AI
- **Website:** https://aibuilderday.com
- **Contact:** hello@justbuild.ing
- **Register:** https://luma.com/aibuilderday

## Day 1 · Friday, May 8 (Learn)

- 8:00 AM · Doors open, check-in, breakfast
- 9:00 AM · Welcome & kickoff
- 9:30 AM · Leadership talks
- 10:30 AM · AI tutorials
- 12:00 PM · Lunch & sponsor expo (Pitada Brazil)
- 12:30 PM · Featured talks
- 1:05 PM · Bounty presentations
- 1:30 PM · Building begins / optional workshops
- 5:00 PM · Building closes

## Day 2 · Saturday, May 9 (AI Builder Day Hackathon)

- 8:00 AM · Building opens, breakfast (kolaches)
- 10:00 AM · Beginner workshop
- 11:00 AM · Optional workshop
- 12:00 PM · Lunch (BBQ)
- 2:00 PM · Code freeze, judging begins
- 3:30 PM · Judges deliberate
- 4:00 PM · Awards ceremony
- 5:00 PM · Building closes

## Bounty Tracks ($35,000 total)

Six sponsor-backed tracks. One project may be submitted to multiple tracks. Final twists pitched live at 1:05 PM Friday.

- **JobNimbus · $10,000** — Presenting sponsor & venue host. Brief revealed live at kickoff. Team of 3–4. 3+ years experience required. https://aibuilderday.com/bounty-jobnimbus
- **The Nucleus Institute · $5,000** — "Utah Innovation Connections Hub." Team of 1–4. Open to anyone. https://aibuilderday.com/bounty-nucleus
- **Governor's Office · The Founder's Navigator · $5,000** — Reimagine how a founder finds what they need on the current state site (https://startupstate.netlify.app/) in under two minutes. Team of 1–3. Open to anyone. https://aibuilderday.com/bounty-goeo-navigator
- **Governor's Office · The Utah Startup Map · $5,000** — Interactive visual map of Utah's startup ecosystem (current site: https://startupstate.netlify.app/). Team of 1–3. Open to anyone. https://aibuilderday.com/bounty-goeo-map
- **MadeThis · $5,000 + 3 months mentorship** — Start a business, validate, earn revenue. Judged on founder–market fit, idea potential, validation/revenue, and quality (25% each). Team of 1–2. Open to anyone. https://aibuilderday.com/bounty-madethis
- **Startup Bounty (Leland · Surge · Cheers) · $5,000** — "Give yourself a promotion." Build an AI system that automates a real chunk of your job. Non-developers welcome. Real-world impact 50%, automation depth 25%, demo believability 25%. Team of 1–2. https://aibuilderday.com/bounty-startup

Index: https://aibuilderday.com/bounties

## Sponsorship Tiers

- **Builder · $2,500:** Logo placement, recruiting access, attendee emails, co-sponsor a shared prize track, social promotion
- **Partner · $5,000:** Everything in Builder, plus a custom hackathon bounty, guaranteed Friday speaker slot, judging seat, featured Bounty Partner placement

Custom packages available: venue, food & beverage, university scholarship sponsorship.

## About JustBuild

JustBuild is Utah's premier AI community on a mission to make Utah AI-native. 400+ engineers, founders, and builders. We host hackathons, coworking sessions, and events trusted by Cerebras, Manus, Windsurf, Bolt, Contrary, Runpod, Mastra, and others. Past events have led to 12+ hires.
